overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from the underwater survival game Subnautica. The player swims through dark bioluminescent caves and hydrothermal vent fields, encountering a large alien sea creature while navigating the alien ocean environment with a flashlight and handheld tool.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow underwater cave tunnel with green bioluminescent lighting

events.description: handheld tool emits a bright white flash pulse illuminating the water

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through the narrow green-lit cave tunnel, scanning the rocky walls with a flashlight

entered.detail: dark jagged rock walls of the underwater cave tunnel
clusters of glowing green crystalline formations attached to the cave walls
cone of white light from the player's handheld flashlight illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a narrow underwater cave tunnel illuminated by green bioluminescent crystals on the walls. The flashlight beam cuts through the murky water as the player explores the enclosed rocky passage, briefly triggering a bright pulse from their handheld tool.

scene_state.functional_zone: hydrothermal vent field with white smoke plumes and purple bioluminescent growths

events.description: large sea dragon leviathan creature emerges from the smoke and swims past the player

agents.ego_description: ascending through the vent field while observing the massive creature swimming through the white smoke plumes

notable_agents.action: massive segmented sea dragon swimming slowly through the hydrothermal vent smoke, illuminated by bioluminescent spots along its body

entered.detail: thick white smoke plumes rising from the seafloor vents creating a cloudy atmosphere
clusters of glowing purple coral formations growing near the vent structures
enormous alien sea creature with segmented body and glowing appendages swimming through the vent field

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide hydrothermal vent field filled with rising white smoke plumes and purple bioluminescent growths. The player ascends through the water as a massive sea dragon leviathan emerges from the smoke and swims past, its segmented body glowing with bioluminescent spots.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep water column with scattered bioluminescent fish schools

agents.ego_description: swimming through the open dark water surrounded by schools of tiny glowing fish and floating bioluminescent particles

entered.detail: large schools of small fish with bright bioluminescent markings swimming in coordinated patterns
clouds of tiny glowing particles suspended in the water column creating a starfield effect

segments.scene_description: Leaving the vent field behind, the player swims through open deep water filled with schools of glowing fish and suspended bioluminescent particles that drift like underwater stars. The environment is dark and expansive with no visible structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cave passage with active hydrothermal vents and purple coral growths

agents.ego_description: navigating between rocky cave walls and approaching the glowing hydrothermal vent structures with purple coral formations

entered.detail: steep rocky cave wall with rough texture forming the left boundary of the passage
tall vent structure emitting white smoke and surrounded by glowing purple growths
dense clusters of bioluminescent purple coral growing on the rocks near the vents

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrower cave passage with rocky walls on both sides, approaching a hydrothermal vent structure emitting white smoke. Purple bioluminescent coral formations glow brightly near the vents as the player explores the enclosed rocky environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that transitions from narrow bioluminescent tunnels into a vast volcanic abyss before returning to a confined rocky passage. It begins within a tight cave tunnel where green crystals illuminate the rocky walls and a flashlight beam cuts through the murky water. As the passage opens, the camera ascends into a wide hydrothermal vent field filled with rising white smoke and purple growths, just as a massive, glowing sea dragon leviathan emerges from the haze and swims past. The scene then expands into the dark, open deep where schools of glowing fish and drifting particles resemble underwater stars, before the camera turns back toward a narrower cave. Finally, the environment closes in again as the player approaches a hydrothermal vent structure surrounded by brightly glowing purple coral formations.
